name: materialLibrary
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.materials.every(m => typeof m.id === 'string' && typeof m.label === 'string' && Number.isFinite(m.E) && Number.isFinite(m.density))
_note: Mechanical-property database (page.tsx Materials tab + GeometryEditor material picker). No id → {materials,categories,count}; each material carries {id,label,category,E,yield,ultimate,density,poisson,cte,thermalK,costPerKg}. A specific id → that material, or ok:false for an unknown id (the tab surfaces an error, not a blank card). Reads from artifact.data. Pure compute, no STATE, deterministic.
